path: PNGS/The Best Womans of all time.png
text: Narrated Anas [may Alish be pleased with hi: that the Prophet (SAW) said: “Suffient for you among the women of mankind are Mariam bint ‘Imvan, (Khadjah bint Knuwaild, Fatimah bint Muhammad and Asiyah the ife of Firawn.~ Grade: Sahih (Darussalam) Reference ¢ o stTirmidhi 2878
